scope: Controlled Ethereum Mainnet production canary with finite release-bound limits; effective only after verified chain-1 deployment and Ledger activation.

wallets.walletARole: disposable deployer/gas payer only; permanent authority count must be zero
wallets.walletBRole: Ledger final Owner and all permanent authorities by public address only

publicRelianceBoundary: Reliance is limited to verified deployed bytecode, published configuration, documented canary limits, and current on-chain status for the enabled scope; it is not a guarantee of safety, returns, availability, legal compliance, or external audit.
requiredGateEvidence: fresh exact-release Sepolia when parity is not proven
authorizedActions: Pre-broadcast technical authorization within CONTROLLED_PRODUCTION_CANARY_V1 scope only
Local/fork rehearsal and evidence generation without Ethereum Mainnet broadcast
Manual operator deployment preparation with immutable plan-hash confirmation
Postdeployment Ledger activation only after chain-1 readback predicates pass
User funds, settlement, public frontend, announcement, and public reliance only after ACTIVE_POSTDEPLOYMENT and within finite canary limits
prohibitedActions: Mainnet broadcast by Codex or CI
Treating documentation-only evidence as a passing Gate predicate
Marking MAINNET_DEPLOYED YES without real chainId=1 transaction evidence
Marking MAINNET_VERIFIED YES without Etherscan V2 or already-verified evidence
Using Wallet A for permanent authority
Requesting, storing, exporting, or printing Wallet B private key or recovery phrase
Enabling unknown or unclassified production surface
Interpreting zero canary limits as unlimited
